title: Coinbase, Kraken and OKX move to swoop up EU users affected by MiCA restrictions
message_html: Coinbase, Kraken and OKX move to swoop up EU users affected by MiCA restrictions ...
snippet: Several exchanges that have already been authorized by EU regulators are attempting to bring in users from companies unlicensed under the Markets in Crypto-Assets rules, offering transfer bonuses and prizes.

title: BNY and Circle expand partnership, adding mint and burn capabilities for USDC
message_html: BNY and Circle expand partnership, adding mint and burn capabilities for USDC ...
snippet: BNY, the world's largest custodian bank, said it plans to add support for additional stablecoin via its Digital Asset Custody platform.
